name: Scrambled Eggs with Lox and Cream Cheese
recipeIngredient: 8 ounces well chilled cream cheese, cut into 1/2 inch cubes
6 ounces thinly sliced Nova Scotia smoked salmon, or lox, cut into 1/2 inch pieces
recipeInstructions:
1. Whisk eggs, salt and pepper in a large bowl until blended.
2. Melt butter in a large nonstick skillet over medium-high heat.
3. Add eggs to the skillet. Using a wooden spoon, stir the eggs until they are almost set, about 5 minutes.
4. Gently fold in cream cheese and salmon, stirring just until the eggs are set, about 1 minute.
5. Transfer the eggs to a platter. Sprinkle with chives if desired, and serve.
